name: Almighty Saints
description: The Almighty Saints are a Hispanic-American People Nation street gang founded in the early 1960s by Polish youth at Davis Square Park in Back of the Yards, Chicago. Later became largely Hispanic as the community's ethnic makeup changed. Named after 'The Saint' TV series (stickman logo). Unique in Chicago for maintaining the same territory since the 1960s. Initially refused to join Folk or People Nations (renegades), but joined People Nation in late 1980s/early 1990s through the Latin Kings for prison protection. In 2004, 'Operation Broken Halo' arrested 25 members. In 2018, member Ernesto Godinez shot undercover ATF agent Kevin Crump in the face during a nighttime operation — prompting a $61K reward manhunt. Godinez got 16 years.
